author: gretmoryt
title: Amazing
content: I really recommend this app, I was sad that my mp3 on Spotify were just blank without artist, but now it’s full of color, and the app is easy to use

author: Adam LP 25
title: the best on app store but not the best in the world
content: so, my problem is that only some of my songs can have changed metadata. but some just turn into public.mp3 file, that can't be played. i do a fix this, is it something i can change?

title: Great
content: Awesome for adding missing album art❤️
